_note: The morning mindful card archive for /mindful. Newest first, one card per build day. Append with: node scripts/add-daily.mjs mindful --day N --date YYYY-MM-DD --card "Title" --quote "..." --take "..." [--source "..."]

cards.quote: You do your best because you WANT to do it - not because you HAVE to do it, not because you are trying to please the Judge, and not because you are trying to please other people.
cards.source: From The Four Agreements, Don Miguel Ruiz.
cards.take: Show up today and do your best because you want to. The build is the application.
